授業目的: The aim of this course is to understand the concept of communication, what features are involved in communication and how communication works in social interaction.
到達目標: At the end of the semester, students acquire skills for critical thinking as well as learn the basic principles of linguistics.
授業方法: workshop style - students are encouraged to have group discussions.

トピック.授業外学習2: Reading chapters of the textbook is essential before class.

教科書/Required texts0: No textbook required although the course is based on the textbook 'Communication Mosaic'.
参考文献・資料/Reference books0: Excerpts of papers and books are provided in class
学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: Each course is positioned within the curriculum in accordance with the diploma policy and curriculum policy established by each undergraduate/graduate school. By proceeding with the study of this course with an awareness of the DP and CP, the following abilities expected by each undergraduate/graduate school will be developed.Global Studies:1. Understanding and analytical skills regarding international issues: the ability to understand and analyze various regions of the world from different perspectives in the humanities and social sciences.2. Problem-solving skills: the ability to proactively identify problems and solve them based on appropriate methods.3. Intercultural understanding and multicultural coexistence: the ability to be sensitive to different cultures and to coexist with diverse cultures.
